ResourceHeader.Description:
The NOAA 11 spacecraft was launched
on 1988-09-24 into a ~850 km, 99 deg inclination (sun synchronous)
orbit.  Principal instruments were the Advanced Very High Resolution
Radiometer (AVHRR), TIROS Operational Vertial Sounder (TOVS), 
and the Solar Backscatter UV Radiometer (SBUV/2).  Data were
provided at least until 1992

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
